hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(python -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))") && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qiE '\.py$' && ruff check --fix "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && ruff format "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true

FILE_PATH=$(python -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))") && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qiE '\.env|secrets|\.toml$' && echo 'BLOCK: 민감 파일 수정 차단됨' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0
